seoTitle: South Innisfail vs South Johnstone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Innisfail and South Johnstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Innisfail vs South Johnstone: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Innisfail and South Johnstone.
heading: South Innisfail vs South Johnstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Innisfail, Queensland and South Johnstone, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Johnstone has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to South Innisfail (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Innisfail or South Johnstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Innisfail has a flood risk score of 52/100, while South Johnstone scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Innisfail scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. South Johnstone scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Innisfail or South Johnstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Johnstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
